overview: BIO-Pak is a modern mobile showcase app for a sustainable packaging startup. It presents the company's biodegradable products made from sugarcane bagasse, manufacturing process, machinery, team, and contact info — all wrapped in a beautiful green and earthy design with smooth animations.
features: Home screen with hero section, tagline, and animated eco icons
Product overview with cards (bags, containers, wraps)
Product features with animated icon cards
9-step manufacturing process timeline with scroll animations
Team profiles with cartoon avatars and glow effects
Contact screen with Call, WhatsApp, and Email action buttons
Bottom navigation with smooth screen transitions
Green, white, and earthy responsive mobile-first design
